title: ophrys ferrum-equinum subsp. lucis
parts: Ophrys ferrum-equinum subsp. lucis has many medicinal parts, such as the flowers, which contain flavonoids like rutin and kaempferol, known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots of the plant are also used medicinally and contain iridoids like catalpol, which have been shown to have anti-diabetic and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of Ophrys ferrum-equinum subsp. lucis contain phenolic acids like chlorogenic acid, which have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
